race_select.title: Choose Your Race
race_select.subtitle: Your race defines your origin and innate traits. You can change this later with a respec.
race_select.subtitle_respec: Choose your race again. Closing without a choice will leave you without a race.

human.name: Human
human.history: The most common people of Talania. Obsessed with carving their own destiny after feeling abandoned by the Gods. Their cities are divided between technology and faith.
human.debuff: Magic Susceptibility: Take slightly more damage from magical attacks.

high_elf.name: High Elf
high_elf.history: Graceful beings tied to Arcanis. Long-lived, they dwell in deep forests or among floating sky isles.

orc.name: Orc
orc.history: Warriors of Gor'thul who thrive in barren wastelands. For them, diplomacy is silence; only steel speaks. Orcs are larger and physically imposing.
orc.debuff: Sluggish Intellect: Slower magic use and mana regeneration.

dwarf.name: Dwarf
dwarf.history: Miners and blacksmiths in vast underground cities, devoted to Zentheros and Valdor. Dwarves are smaller and stockier.
dwarf.buff: Stone Skin: Tougher armor and resistance to poisons.
dwarf.debuff: Heavy Steps: Slower movement and swimming speed.

nightwalker.name: Nightwalker
nightwalker.history: Rare survivors exposed to raw Void energy. Dark ichor flows in their veins, and they are believed blessed by Nocturne.
nightwalker.buff: Shadow Meld: Faster movement at night or in darkness.
nightwalker.debuff: Sun Curse: Reduced health regeneration in sunlight.

beastkin.name: Beastkin
beastkin.history: Half-animal tribes who follow Sylvaris and Halcyon, guided by instinct and tradition.
beastkin.buff: Predator's Agility: Higher jump height and reduced fall damage.
beastkin.debuff: Primitive Technology: Lower accuracy with firearms and complex wands.

starborn.name: Starborn
starborn.history: Crystalline beings born from meteors, with glowing energy veins instead of flesh.
starborn.buff: Energy Shield: A regenerating shield absorbs damage before health.
starborn.debuff: Healing Difficulty: Food and potions are less effective.
